content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the current worktree diff plus the latest implementation checkpoint affecting `src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs`, `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs`, and the related backend policy/diagnostics tests. The precedence fix for explicit `default_model` vs compiled Codex role defaults is consistent across resolution and diagnostics, and backend-focused unit coverage (`cargo test --test unit backend_` and the new explicit-default-model cases) passed. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found in this change set.

## Amendments

None.
